title: No OP TP Port
description: No OP TP Port allows players to teleport without OP or enabling cheats.
body:
No OP TP Port allows players to teleport without OP or enabling cheats.

Designed to work perfectly with Xaero’s World Map, but also provides a standalone /tp command — meaning players can teleport even without any map mod installed.

This mod replaces vanilla /tp with a safe implementation so servers and singleplayer worlds can keep cheats disabled while still allowing teleportation.

Works on both servers and singleplayer.

Features:
- Teleport without OP
- Cheats OFF supported
- Works on multiplayer servers
- Works without any map mod installed
- Compatible with Xaero’s World Map
- Supports /tp, /tp @s, and /tp @s <player>
- Blocks all other OP commands

Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric)

Requires Fabric API.

                                                                                                                                                                             



⚠️ WARNING FOR SERVER OWNERS:

This mod intentionally enables /tp for ALL players without OP.

Anyone on your server will be able to teleport using /tp, even with cheats disabled.

Only install this mod if you WANT players to have teleport access.

This mod is designed for:
- SMP servers with trusted players
- Private servers
- Modpacks that allow teleporting
- Singleplayer worlds

Do NOT use on public servers unless you understand the implications.

Server installation:
- Upload the mod to your server's mods folder
- Make sure Fabric API is also installed
- Restart the server

                                                                                                                                                                             

Permissions:

This mod replaces Minecraft’s default /tp command and sets it to permission level 0.

This means ALL players can teleport without OP.

No other operator commands are affected.

Only /tp is enabled — commands like /give, /gamemode, and /op remain locked.

                                                                                                                                                                             

FAQ:

Q: Does this work on servers?
A: Yes. This mod works on both multiplayer servers and singleplayer.

Q: Does this require Xaero’s World Map?
A: No. Xaero’s Map is optional. The mod provides a standalone /tp command.

Q: Do players need OP?
A: No. /tp works without OP.

Q: Does this enable cheats?
A: No. Cheats remain disabled.

Q: Can I teleport a player to me?
A: No. Only self teleport is supported.

Q: Can I teleport myself to another player?
A: Yes. via /tp @s player, Or if useing Xaero's world map right click on player and left click teleport.

Q: Is Fabric API required?
A: Yes.

Q: What Minecraft versions are supported?
A: Currently Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric).

Q: Is this safe for public servers?
A: Only if you WANT all players to have teleport access.

                                                                                                                                                                             

Troubleshooting:

/tp says "Unknown command"
- Make sure Fabric API is installed
- Make sure No OP Port (Fabric) is in the mods folder
- Restart the game or server

Players still need OP
- Make sure no other mods are overriding /tp
- Restart after installing the mod
- Verify you are running Fabric, not Forge or Vanilla

Server won’t start
- Confirm Fabric Loader is installed on the server
- Confirm Fabric API is present
- Check latest.log for missing dependencies

Teleport does nothing
- Make sure you are using supported formats:
/tp x y z
/tp @s x y z
/tp @s <player>

Xaero’s Map teleport doesn’t work
- Ensure both No OP Port and Fabric API are installed on the server
- Restart server after installing mods

Mod not loading
- Verify Minecraft version is 1.20.1
- Check that Fabric Loader version matches
- Remove conflicting mods and test again

Still having issues?
If you find a bug, please include your Minecraft version and latest.log. ( If you dont want everyone to see your log please send me a DM And i will get back to you ASAP)

                                                                                                                                                                             

Known Issues:

- This mod intentionally allows ALL players to use /tp without OP.
  This is not a bug.

- Cannot distinguish between chat teleport and map teleport on Fabric 1.20.1.
  Players can manually type /tp.

- Incompatible with mods that replace or heavily modify Minecraft’s command system.

- Player names must be exact when using /tp @s <player>.

- Cross-dimension teleport may behave differently depending on server configuration.

- Public servers should only use this mod if teleporting is intended.

If you find a bug, please include your Minecraft version and latest.log. ( If you dont want everyone to see your log please send me a DM And i will get back to you ASAP)
